name: part_009
file: tmp_【 3DLIVE 】#アキロゼ生誕祭2026 ーLife is GAMEー【ホロライブ⧸アキ・ローゼンタール】 [_tBlI-l8WLk]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_009.webm

scenes.description: Aki Rosenthal performs a energetic dance routine while singing 'Bad Apple!!' on a dynamic stage with shifting visuals.
The scene transitions through a glitchy, stylized sequence featuring cards and dice, leading to a new stage setup for the next performance.
Aki Rosenthal, Ookami Mio, and AZKi perform a powerful rendition of 'Magia' in a gothic-inspired setting with intense lighting effects.

subtitles.original: 避けよう 何も感じず 過ごせばいいの
subtitles.english: Should I avoid it? It'd be fine to pass the time feeling nothing

subtitles.original: 戸惑う言葉 与えられても 自分の心 ただ上の空
subtitles.english: Even if I'm given confusing words, my heart is just absent-minded

subtitles.original: もし私から 動くのならば 全て変えるのなら 黒にする
subtitles.english: If I were to make a move, if I were to change everything, I'd turn it black

subtitles.original: 動くのならば 全て壊すわ 全て壊すわ
subtitles.english: If I make a move, I'll destroy everything, I'll destroy it all

subtitles.original: 悲しむならば 私の心 白く変われる？
subtitles.english: If I were to grieve, could my heart turn white?

subtitles.original: あなたのことも 私のことも 全てのことも まだ知らないの
subtitles.english: About you, about me, about everything, I still don't know

subtitles.original: 重い瞼を 開けたのならば 全て壊すのなら 黒になれ
subtitles.english: If I were to open my heavy eyelids, if I were to destroy everything, let it turn black

subtitles.original: （ヴォーカリゼーション）
subtitles.english: (Vocalization)

subtitles.original: いつか君が瞳に灯す愛の光が
subtitles.english: The light of love you'll one day light in your eyes

subtitles.original: 時を超えて 滅び急ぐ世界の夢を
subtitles.english: Transcending time, the dreams of a world rushing towards ruin

subtitles.original: 確かに一つ 壊すだろう
subtitles.english: Will surely destroy one of them

subtitles.original: 躊躇いを飲み干して
subtitles.english: Drink down your hesitation

subtitles.original: 君が望むものは何？
subtitles.english: What is it that you desire?

subtitles.original: こんな欲深い憧れの行方に 儚い明日はあるの？
subtitles.english: In the destination of such greedy longings, is there a fleeting tomorrow?

subtitles.original: 子供の頃夢に見てた 古の魔法のように
subtitles.english: Like the ancient magic I dreamed of as a child

subtitles.original: 闇さえ砕く力で 微笑む君に会いたい
subtitles.english: With a power that can crush even darkness, I want to see you smiling

subtitles.original: 怯えるこの手の中には 倒られた花と勇気
subtitles.english: In these trembling hands are fallen flowers and courage

subtitles.original: 想いだけが頼る全て 光を呼び覚ます願い
subtitles.english: My feelings are all I rely on, a wish that awakens the light

subtitles.original: （ヴォーカリゼーション）
subtitles.english: (Vocalization)

subtitles.original: いつか君も誰かのために 強い力を望むのだろう
subtitles.english: One day, you too will desire great power for someone's sake

subtitles.original: 愛が胸を捕らえた夜に 未知の言葉が生まれてくる
subtitles.english: On the night love seized your heart, unknown words were born

subtitles.original: 迷わずに行けるなら 心が砕けてもいいわ
subtitles.english: If I can go without straying, it's fine if my heart shatters

subtitles.original: いつも目の前の悲しみに 立ち向かうための呪文が欲しい
subtitles.english: I want a spell to confront the sorrow always before my eyes

subtitles.original: 君はまだ夢見る記憶 私は眠らない明日
subtitles.english: You are still memories within a dream, I am a tomorrow that never sleeps

subtitles.original: 二人が出会う奇跡を 勝ち取るために進むの
subtitles.english: Moving forward to grasp the miracle of our encounter

subtitles.original: 怯えるこの手の中には 倒られた花と刃
subtitles.english: In these trembling hands are fallen flowers and a blade

subtitles.original: 想いだけが生きる全て 心に振りかざす願い
subtitles.english: My feelings are all that live, a wish brandished in my heart

subtitles.original: （ヴォーカリゼーション）
subtitles.english: (Vocalization)
